pitchSequence.description: Curveball low and outside, ball one
Hammered foul and into the stands, strike one
Fastball cut on and missed, strike two
Hit in the air to right-center, Chang makes the catch

notes: Count progression: 1-0, 2-0, 2-1, 2-2, then flyout. Gasparro flied out in the second. Chang drifts in for the catch, out number one.

pitchSequence.description: Dribbled foul on the first base line, strike one
Low curve, checked swing, ball one
Chopper to third, Rudderson fires to first

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 1-1, then groundout. Cortez walked in the second. Rudderson fields and fires to first for out number two.
First-pitch popup. Castor calls for it and makes the catch to end the inning. One-two-three inning for Von Neumann. Hughes drew a walk in the second. Score remains Cadillac 1, Big Rapids 0.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball cut on and missed, strike one
Hard grounder up the middle, squeezes through for a base hit

notes: Count progression: 0-1, then single. Nunez popped out in the first. Leadoff single for the Timbers in the bottom of the fourth.

pitchSequence.description: Called strike on the stolen base pitch, strike one
Slow roller to second, Cortez flips to first

stolenBase.description: Runner goes, Gasparro fires to second, Nunez slides in under the tag

notes: Stolen base by Nunez on the first pitch (called strike). Then on 0-1, slow roller to second moves Nunez to third. Castor struck out in the first. One out, runner on third.

pitchSequence.description: Paints the corner for a called strike one
Low roller up the middle, Slauson fields it, no play at the plate, toss to first in time

notes: RBI groundout for Chang. Nunez scores from third to tie the game at one. Slauson fields up the middle, no play at the plate, retires Chang at first. Chang grounded out in the second. Two outs, bases empty.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play, strike one
Fouls another one off, strike two

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 0-2, then called strike three on the curveball. Filbert struck out in the second. Ends the inning. Timbers score one run to tie it at 1-1 after four innings.
